items.title: Keefe Bruyette Updates Goldman Sachs (GS) Outlook Following Conference Discussions
items.description: The Goldman Sachs Group, Inc. (NYSE:GS) is included among the 10 Cash-Rich Stocks to Buy Now. On December 17, Keefe Bruyette raised its price target on The Goldman Sachs Group, Inc. (NYSE:GS) to $971 from $870 and kept a Market Perform rating on the shares. The firm updated its estimates after recent conference discussions and […]

items.title: Goldman Sachs resets bets on US economy in 2026
items.description: Warren Buffett quipped in Berkshire Hathaway's 1992 shareholders letter that, "We've long felt that the only value of stock forecasters is to make fortune tellers look good." He has a point. History may rhyme, but rarely repeats, to paraphrase Twain. If I've learned anything over the past 30 ...

items.title: US economy expected to grow faster in 2026 despite stagnant job market: Goldman Sachs
items.description: Goldman Sachs economists predict U.S. economic growth will accelerate to 2.6% in 2026, driven by tax cuts, reduced tariff drag and Federal Reserve rate cuts.
